name: Moonshot v1
tagline: Closed API generation family: moonshot-v1-8k / 32k / 128k text models and matching -vision-preview multimodal variants on the Kimi platform.
seoTitle: Moonshot v1 — Moonshot AI (Kimi) LLM specs
metaDescription: Moonshot v1 (Moonshot AI (Kimi)) — part of the Moonshot v1 line. Closed API generation family: moonshot-v1-8k / 32k / 128k text models and matching -vision-pre…
overview: Moonshot v1 is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Moonshot v1 line. Proprietary API-only generation models offered in 8K/32K/128K context tiers plus vision-preview variants.
What's notable in this version: Closed API generation family: moonshot-v1-8k / 32k / 128k text models and matching -vision-preview multimodal variants on the Kimi platform.
